"use strict";
Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true });
const bcrypt = require("bcrypt");
const client_1 = require("@prisma/client");
const system_role_baseline_1 = require("./seeds/baseline/system-role-baseline");
const seed_document_demo_1 = require("./seeds/demo/seed-document-demo");
const seed_ops_demo_1 = require("./seeds/demo/seed-ops-demo");
const prisma = new client_1.PrismaClient();
async function main() {
    const password = process.env.DEFAULT_ADMIN_PASSWORD || 'ChangeMe123!';
    const adminPasswordHash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 10);
    await (0, system_role_baseline_1.ensureSystemRoleBaseline)(prisma, { ensureAdminUser: true, adminPasswordHash });
    await (0, seed_document_demo_1.seedDocumentDemo)();
    await (0, seed_ops_demo_1.seedOpsDemo)();
}
main()
    .catch((error) => {
    console.error(error);
    process.exit(1);
})
    .finally(async () => {
    await prisma.$disconnect();
});
